verdict_reason: Chapter 2 thesis: Krishna refuses the tactical answer and reframes the system at first principles, with three threads — Sāṅkhya (first principles), karma-yoga (disciplined action), sthita-prajña (the seasoned operator). 2.41 anchors in the karma-yoga thread by introducing buddhi-yoga's prerequisite cognitive state (vyavasāyātmikā buddhi). The engineering layer — 'the migration plan actually grounded in customer-need and system-truth' — preserves the chapter's emphasis on action issuing from a grounded substrate, not from impulse. The verse-ordering claim: 2.41 logically precedes 2.42-44 (which describe what happens when this resolved buddhi is absent — kāmya-vāda fixation captures cetas) and 2.45 (which gives the operative injunction). The engineering layers respect this ordering: 2.41 names the precondition, 2.42-44 name the obstruction, 2.45 gives the imperative. The block builds progressively. PASS for both 10.3 (chapter thesis support) and 10.4 (verse ordering).
